overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character jogging through a lush green forest trail. The character descends toward a waterfall, passes a dead boar carcass, and continues along a riverside path in a vibrant natural setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall canopy trees

agents.ego_description: samurai character jogging steadily down a forest path surrounded by lush greenery

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees forming a dense forest canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest undergrowth
large moss-covered boulders emerging on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a samurai jogging through a dense forest. Tall trees line both sides of a narrow dirt path, with large rock formations becoming visible on the left as the character progresses forward through the lush green undergrowth.

events.description: waterfall becomes visible through the trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing down the trail toward the waterfall, navigating slight curves in the path

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down rock face visible through the tree canopy
flowing water stream running parallel to the path below

segments.scene_description: As the character moves deeper into the forest, the path curves slightly left revealing a magnificent waterfall cascading down rocks on the left. The large rock formation moves closer to the foreground while a stream becomes visible in the distance below the trail.

events.description: dead boar carcass with blood becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: jogging past the dead boar and continuing along the riverside trail

notable_agents.action: dead boar lying on the ground with visible blood pool beside the path

entered.detail: tropical palm tree visible on the right side near the stream

segments.scene_description: The character passes a dead boar carcass lying on the right side of the path before continuing along the trail. The waterfall and stream are now closer on the left, while palm trees appear on the right. The large rock formations and dense trees on the right recede behind as the path opens toward the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that gradually opens up toward a riverside waterfall. It begins by trailing a samurai jogging along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall trees and large rock formations. As the character moves deeper into the greenery, the path curves to reveal a magnificent waterfall cascading down the rocks on the left while a stream emerges in the distance below. The scene then shifts as the character passes a dead boar carcass on the right, with the surrounding forest receding to make way for palm trees. Finally, the camera follows the samurai as the trail opens further toward the water, bringing the waterfall and stream into closer view.
